SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter.model

Class ProxyEndpoint

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.model.ProxyEndpoint
public class ProxyEndpoint extends Object
Represents an Apigee ProxyEndpoint configuration. Contains flow definitions, HTTP proxy connection settings, and route rules.
